morning.title: Claude Opus 4.8 Launches with State-of-the-Art Long-Horizon Agentic Execution
morning.summary: Anthropic's most capable model yet delivers breakthrough performance on multi-step autonomous tasks, with cleaner prose and a warmer writing voice compared to Opus 4.7.

morning.title: OpenAI Releases o3-mini and o3 — the Most Powerful Reasoning Models Yet
morning.summary: OpenAI's latest reasoning models achieve record scores on PhD-level science benchmarks, pushing the frontier of AI problem-solving and coding capability.

morning.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini 2.5 Pro Tops Coding Benchmarks
morning.summary: Gemini 2.5 Pro achieves top scores on SWE-bench, signaling intensifying competition in AI coding assistance and agentic software engineering.

morning.title: Startup Funding Roundup: AI Infrastructure Sees $2B+ in New Deals
morning.summary: A wave of AI infrastructure startups focused on inference optimization, vector databases, and GPU orchestration attracted massive VC interest this week.

morning.title: Rust Surpasses Go in GitHub Stars and Developer Adoption for Systems Work
morning.summary: Developer surveys show Rust's memory-safety guarantees and improving tooling are winning over engineers previously loyal to Go for backend systems programming.

gym.title: I Invested $10,000 in Index Funds for 10 Years — Here's What Happened
gym.summary: A real-money experiment tracking passive index investing returns over a decade, covering compounding, tax drag, and the emotional discipline required.

gym.title: The Science of Getting Rich Without Luck
gym.summary: Evidence-backed strategies for building wealth through skill stacking, audience building, and productizing your expertise—not just saving.

gym.title: Andrew Huberman: How to Rewire Your Brain for Deep Focus
gym.summary: Neurobiologist explains actionable protocols—morning light, cold exposure, and strategic caffeine timing—that prime your brain for sustained concentration.

gym.title: 100 Days of Building in Public — What I Learned
gym.summary: Filmmaker documents lessons from sharing creative work daily: overcoming perfectionism, audience growth, and the compounding effect of small consistent output.

gym.title: AI Agents Explained in 10 Minutes — The Future of Software
gym.summary: Fast-paced breakdown of how LLM-powered agents work, what tool use and memory look like in practice, and which frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen) are gaining traction.
